Dr. Richard Yu

personal site

Richard C. Yu joined the Institute in September 2000 after earning a Ph.D. Molecular Biophysics and Biochemistry from Yale University in New Haven, Connecticut.

His thesis was entitled "X-ray crystallograhpic analyses of NSF, a protein involved in eukaryotic membrane fusion."

Return to the Molecular Sciences Institute People Page
